title: Taylors Eye Witness Mini Silicone Buttermilk & Turquoise Palette Knife - Dishwasher Safe, Heat Resistant (260°C/500°F), Ideal for Icing and Decorating
features: This mini silicone palette knife is ideal for smoothing frosting and decorating small cakes, cupcakes, and pastries. It is heat-resistant up to 260°C (500°F) and safe for use on delicate surfaces. Its ergonomic design provides extra control and comfort. Dishwasher safe for easy maintenance. Measures 24cm (9.5 inches), perfect for detailed decorating.
description: Presented by Taylors Eye Witness: Mix or Match Coloured Kitchen Utensil Silicone Tool Range: 19 Colour options, 15 different utensil or tool set choices, matched to the Syracuse kitchen knife range, consisting of the same colours. Combining the tools and the knives gives over 150 different product options to get the perfect match to your kitchen, cafe or restaurant. COLOUR CHOICES: Mushroom Grey Graphite Grey Lavender Lagoon Blue Cherry Blossom Aqua Blue Lichen Green Stonewash Blue Denim Blue Airforce Blue Black Coral Fuchsia Yellow Raspberry Berry Baked Clay Peach Mustard TOOL CHOICES: Mini & Large Spoons Brush (Mini & Large) Palette Knife (mini & normal) Spatula Spoon Spatula Slotted Turner (Mini, Normal & Wide) Whisk Ladle (Mini & Normal) Bottle Cleaner Tongs (Mini, Large & Straight) Potato Masher Sets of Silicone Tools Check out our Storefront to see the full range together Taylors Eye Witness is a 150 year old company, which was founded by John Taylor in the early years of the 19th Century as designers and producers of kitchen knives, pocket knives, scissors sharpeners and kitchen utensils. Employing highly skilled Sheffield designers and craftsmen with a knowledge base which is unrivalled, Taylors Eye Witness have stood the test of time through an unrelenting dedication to quality, service and good old fashioned technical know-how.
